title: Bamboo Everything
description: Adds extra blocks/items made with bamboo, Forge and Fabric compatible
body:
### Mod Info

This mod adds new building blocks made with bamboo, each block includes a dry texture variant as well

#### Modpack Usage

 You are welcome to use this mod in your modpack

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/677/335/java_2023-06-14_16-05-21.png)
